## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` is clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] Public API items have rustdoc (`///`)
- [ ] Docs / README / demos updated if behavior changed
- [ ] New forge/format/behavior sits behind the existing traits (no core coupling)
